parameters.jsCode:
const rawCall = $('Get Call').first().json;
const call = Array.isArray(rawCall) ? (rawCall[0] || {}) : (rawCall || {});
const rawRubric = $('Get Active Rubric').first().json;
const rubric = Array.isArray(rawRubric) ? (rawRubric[0] || {}) : (rawRubric || {});
const transcript = (call.transcript_raw || 'No transcript available.').substring(0, 6000);
const rubricContent = JSON.stringify(rubric.content || {}, null, 2).substring(0, 1500);

const FIELDS = [
  'overall_score: number 0-10 (weighted avg of rubric criteria; for team/internal calls score on meeting quality)',
  'summary: string â€” 2-3 sentence executive summary of the whole call',
  'meeting_phase: one of: discovery, onboarding, kick_off, ai_onboarding, strategy_review, status_update, sales_pitch, demo, training, internal_sync, one_on_one, project_review, quarterly_review, closing_call, renewal, escalation, feedback_session, content_review, other',
  'attendees: array of strings â€” each entry: Name (email if visible) â€” role/company',
  'talk_time_breakdown: array of objects {speaker, seconds (estimate), percentage} â€” percentages must sum to 100',
  'key_points: array of strings â€” main points discussed',
  'decisions: array of strings â€” decisions made during the call',
  'action_items: array of strings â€” format: [HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW] Task description â€” Owner: Name â€” Due: timeframe',
  'next_steps: array of strings',
  'open_questions: array of strings â€” questions raised but not resolved',
  'risks: array of strings â€” concerns or risks mentioned',
  'suggestions: array of strings â€” ideas or suggestions raised',
  'projects: array of strings â€” specific projects or campaigns discussed',
  'banned_phrases: array of strings â€” filler or weak phrases actually spoken (e.g. to be honest, um, basically, just)',
  'strengths: array of {criterion, score 0-10, description, evidence_quote (exact transcript phrase), timestamp_seconds or null}',
  'improvements: array of {criterion, score 0-10, description, evidence_quote (exact transcript phrase), timestamp_seconds or null}',
  'coaching_priorities: top 3 only â€” array of {priority 1-3, area, what_happened (brief quote or description), what_to_do_instead (specific actionable advice), impact (why this matters)} â€” for sales calls only, skip for team/internal',
  'meeting_effectiveness: object {score 0-10, agenda_clarity, decisions_ratio, action_coverage, focus_score 0-10, summary} â€” fill for ALL call types'
].join('\n');

const systemPrompt = [
  'You are an expert sales coach and meeting intelligence system for WeBuildTrades, a UK marketing agency for trade businesses.',
  '',
  'Analyze the call transcript thoroughly and return ONE JSON object. No markdown fences, no explanation â€” ONLY the JSON.',
  '',
  'Sales Playbook (active rubric):',
  rubricContent,
  '',
  'Required fields (include ALL, use empty array [] when nothing relevant for that section):',
  FIELDS,
  '',
  'Rules:',
  '- evidence_quote must be EXACT phrases from the transcript',
  '- coaching_priorities: include only for client-facing sales calls (discovery, ads_intro, launch, follow_up)',
  '- meeting_effectiveness: always include for every call type',
  '- Return [] for list sections with nothing relevant â€” never omit a field'
].join('\n');

return [{ json: { systemPrompt, userMessage: 'Analyze this call transcript:\n\n' + transcript } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { call_id: $json.call_id, rubric_id: $json.rubric_id, overall_score: $json.overall_score, summary: $json.summary, strengths: $json.strengths, improvements: $json.improvements, llm_model: $json.llm_model, coaching_priorities: $json.coaching_priorities } }}
={{ { model: 'claude-sonnet-4-6', max_tokens: 4000, system: $json.systemPrompt, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.turn2UserMsg }] } }}

={{ { model: 'claude-sonnet-4-6', max_tokens: 500, system: 'You are a sales coaching assistant. Return only raw JSON.', messages: [  { role: 'user', content: $('Build Enriched Request').first().json.turn2UserMsg },  { role: 'assistant', content: ($('Turn 2: Score Call').first().json.content || [{}])[0].text || '' },  { role: 'user', content: 'Synthesis as raw JSON only: {"manager_summary":"2-sentence manager summary","positive_reinforcement":"one specific strength"}' }] } }}
